header: S. S. da Grama (SP) / Pocos de Caldas (MG)

lesson.menu_desc: Shopping & Returns -- Sizes, Fit & too / not enough -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Out and About -- Shopping & Returns
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Tuca Dias | Aula 16 -- Out and About

listenings.text: Good afternoon, shoppers, and welcome to The Highland Store. Thank you for browsing with us today. We would like to tell you about a few things this afternoon. First, our autumn sale is now on, and many items have a discount of up to thirty percent, so it is a great time to look around. You will find shoes and boots in the first aisle, jackets and coats in the second, and accessories near the cashier. If you would like to try something on, the fitting rooms are at the back of the store, on the left. Please remember to ask one of our team if you need a different size, because we keep more sizes in the back room. We are also happy to help if something does not fit, or if an item is faulty. You can bring it back within thirty days, with your receipt, for an exchange or a full refund. One more thing: the store closes at eight this evening, so there is plenty of time to find what you are looking for. Thank you for shopping with us, and enjoy your afternoon.

Hi Tuca, it is me. I just got back from the shops and I have to tell you all about it. So, I went to that new store I told you about, and honestly, it was a bit much at first. The first jacket I tried on was lovely, but it was too small, and the next size up was too big, so neither one was right. The shop assistant was so kind. She went to the back room and found one that was a perfect fit, and the best part is it was on sale, with a thirty percent discount. While I was browsing, I also found some boots, but they were too expensive for me this month, so I left them. Oh, and remember the shirt I bought last week? It was faulty, there was a hole in the sleeve, so I took it back today. They were really nice about it. I had my receipt, so I got a full refund, no problem at all. You really should go before the sale ends. When you do, would you mind looking for a scarf for me? Talk soon. Bye.

extra_audio.text: First, Tuca walked into the store and started to browse the aisles. Then she found a jacket she liked and asked the assistant if they had it in her size. After that, she took it to the fitting room to try it on, but it was too big. Next, the assistant brought a smaller size that was a perfect fit, and it had a discount. Finally, she remembered a faulty shirt from last week, took it back with her receipt, and asked for a refund.
